folio.label: 20v
folio.l: ¢ Who coude ryme , in englyssú ¸prely
Hys martirdom , by god it am nat I
Therfore I passe , as lightly as I may
It fel , that in the , vij , ©ere , in May
The thridde nygút , as olde bokes seyn
That al this storie , tellen more pleyn
Were it by auentåe , or destyne
As whan a æingö is shapen , it shal be
That sone after the mydnygút , Palamou~
By helpyngö of a frende , brake his prisou~
And fleeth the Citee , as fast as he may go
For he had ©eue , his Iayler drynke so
Of Clarry , mad of a certeyn wyne
W Nerkotikes and opye , of Thebes fyne
That al æ nygút , æougú æ men wold hi~ shake

note.notetxt: 615there is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: The Iayler slep so , he mygút nou©t wake
¢ And thus he fleeth , as fast as euäe he may
The nygút was short , and fast by the day
That nedes cost , he must hi~ seluen hyde
And to a groue , fast there besyde
W dredful fote , than walketh Palamou~
For shortly , this was his oppinyou~
That in æat groue , he wold hi~ hyde al day
And in the nygút , æan wold he take his wey
To Thebes ward , his frendes for to pray
On Theseus to helpen hi~ , to werrey
And shortly , eiæä he wold lese hise lyf´
Or wynnen Emelye , vn to his wyf´
This is æe effect , and his entent pleyn
¢ Now wyl I tåne , to Arcite a geyn
That litel wyst , how ny æ was his care
Til æ fortune , had brougút hi~ in æe snare
The besy larke , the messanger of day
Saleweth in hir songö , the morwe gray
And verray Phebus , riseth vp so brygút

note.notetxt: 635this line was inserted with a lighter shade of ink which suggests that there was a gap in the text and the scribe filled it in later.This is an example between the difference of brown and dark brown.ODR

folio.l: That al æe orient , laugheth of æe ligút
And w hise stremes , drieth in the greues
The siluer dropes , hangyngö on the leues
And Arcite æat is , in the court rial
With Theseus , the squyer principal
Ys rysen and loketh , on the mery day
And for to dou~ , his obseruau~ce to May
Remembryngö on æe poynt , of his desyre

note.notetxt: Folios missing: 22,23,24,25. Numbering jumps from L 643 to L 1074.
